frontmatter.title: Call-by-push-value: a functional/imperative synthesis
frontmatter.meta: @book{levy:2003:book, author = {Levy, Paul Blain}, publisher = {Kluwer, Semantic Structures in Computation, 2}, year = {2003}, month = jan, isbn = {1-4020-1730-8}, title = {Call-by-Push-Value: A Functional/Imperative Synthesis}, }
